claims.text: 18. A method for the treatment of cardiovascular disorders comprising administering a composition according to claim 1 to a host in need of such treatment in a therapeutically effective amount.

use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HYPERTENSION AND ANGINA PECTORIS

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
TOPROL-XL is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure.
Lowering blood pressure lowers the risk of fatal and non-fatal cardiovascular events,
primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been seen in controlled
trials of antihypertensi...

Hypertension
TOPROL-XL is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in combination
with other antihypertensive agents.
Angina Pectoris
TOPROL-XL is indicated in the long-term treatment of angina pectoris.
